title: Refer Me
description: An online platform for engineering students, built using the MERN stack and utilizing Firebase and MongoDB for database storage

title: DevLink-Connect

title: OSimulate

title: WEATHER APP
description: It is a Node.js server application that fetches real-time weather data using OpenWeatherMap API and displays it on a web page.
